name: telebirr-p2p-gateway
description: Multi-merchant Telebirr P2P gateway, fleet control plane and operator portals.

scripts.build: npm -w @telebirr/contracts run build && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm -w @telebirr/contracts run build && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @telebirr/contracts run build && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
